message:
fix(session-auth): prevent Terminating state from leaking into expiry and reuse paths

Three related fixes to the Terminating session state machine:

1. expire() — Add Terminating to the guard so an idle timeout cannot
   overwrite an in-progress teardown with Expired, which would silently
   un-block duplicate-ID reuse
2. terminate() — Fix comment from "Active/Terminating → Terminated" to
   "Active/Terminating/Expired → Terminated" to match the actual match
   pattern that already included Expired
3. collect_reusable_slots() — Add Terminating to the exclusion filter
   so a Terminating session that has timed out cannot appear reusable,
   preventing duplicate-ID reuse before teardown completes

Add test_terminating_session_does_not_expire and integration test
verifying duplicate establish with same session_id returns
DuplicateLiveSession with preserved send_seq counter.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
